results.title: Can E20 petrol lead to claim rejection? Here's what ICICI Lombard says
results.description: Concerns over E20 petrol impacting insurance claims have been addressed by ICICI Lombard. The insurer clarified that motor insurance policies remain valid for vehicles using E20 fuel and claims won't be rejected solely based on fuel type. Admissibility depends on insured events, not the petrol blend used, aligning with India's push for greener fuels.

results.title: ASX Stages Late Comeback After RBA Holds Rates Steady
results.description: Australian shares recovered late in the session as the RBA kept rates unchanged, with energy and gold stocks leading gains.

results.title: World's Costliest Mango Worth Rs 1 Lakh Offered At Ram Temple In Ayodhya
results.description: The rare mango is valued between Rs 2.5 lakh and Rs 3 lakh per kg in the international market.

results.title: BRB Capital Group Acquires FCA-Authorised Amalfi Capital to Build a Regulated Bridge Between Lagos and Global Markets
results.description: The acquisition pairs an FCA-authorised UK platform with BRB Capital Group’s SEC-regulated Nigerian operations, creating cross-border investment infrastructure for the £8.1 billion UK–Nigeria trade corridor. BRB Capital Group today announced the acquisition of Amalfi Capital Limited, an FCA-authorised investment advisory and brokerage firm headquartered in London, in a landmark move to build a regulated investment [...] The post BRB Capital Group Acquires FCA-Authorised Amalfi Capital to Build a Regulated Bridge Between Lagos and Global Markets appeared first on Nairametrics .
